calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance, or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION SILVA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on PLAINTIFF CONCEPCION SILVA's Motion For An Order Establishing Admissions, as follows:

Plaintiffs' unopposed motion is granted. Defendant Jose Antonio Escolero, a/k/a Jose Antonio Escolero Bonillo, has waived all objections to, and is deemed to have admitted the truth of all matters specified in, Plaintiff Concepcion Silva's Request for Admissions To Defendant Jose Antonio Escolero Bonilla - Set Two, dated July 26, 2019.

The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-09-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Osc Re: Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vernon Goins, Esq. 510-663-3700, appearing for Northridge Cooperative, Plaintiff and moving party.

Alex Lemberg, Esq. of Open Door, 415-604-3867, appearing for Thyesia Bacon, for Defendant and opposing party.

ARGUED. Mr. Lemberg clarified that he misunderstood his client, that he believed Mr. Goines told Thyesia that she would immediatley lose her housing, that it was acutally Kevin Barr who said that and that Thyesia signed the agreement under duress.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Osc Re: Writ Of Attachment is granted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
